name: Rocky-High school AU
description:
I’m back with an amusing new character: another dog, but this one has a bit more depth. He’s an older pup, clearly seasoned by life, with a bit of an emo vibe. Picture him with a slightly disheveled coat and soulful eyes. Despite his brooding exterior, he has a surprising passion for recycling—maybe he’s trying to save the planet in his own unique way.terestingly, he sometimes puts on an act, pretending to be homophobic, which creates a humorous contrast given that he’s actually gay himself. This internal conflict adds a layer of complexity to his character, making him both endearing and relatable. 😅

»»——⍟——««

I'm making the school serious about the PAW Patrol as teenagers don't worry about their age up to ages 18 or 20

Episode three, Rock
